content:
Table: conversations

Columns:
  - id (VARCHAR(36))
  - title (VARCHAR(255), nullable)
  - created_at (DATETIME, nullable)
  - updated_at (DATETIME, nullable)

Primary Key: id

Table: dcdistributions

Columns:
  - id (BIGINT)
  - item_id (BIGINT) [dctools]
  - quantity_sent (DOUBLE, nullable, default=0.00)
  - date_sent (DATE, nullable)
  - sent_from (BIGINT) [facilities]
  - sentfrom_state (VARCHAR(30) COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_ci", nullable)
  - sent_to (BIGINT) [facilities]
  - sentto_state (VARCHAR(30) COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_ci", nullable)
  - documents (VARCHAR(80) COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_ci", nullable)
  - remarks (VARCHAR(80) COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_ci", nullable)
  - sent_by (VARCHAR(191) COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_ci", nullable)
  - received_by (VARCHAR(191) COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_ci", nullable)
  - batchno (VARCHAR(80) COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_ci", nullable)
  - rdocuments (VARCHAR(80) COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_ci", nullable)
  - rremarks (VARCHAR(80) COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_ci", nullable)
  - quantity_received (DOUBLE, nullable, default=0.00)
  - created_at (TIMESTAMP, nullable)
  - updated_at (TIMESTAMP, nullable)

Primary Key: id
